nasb.text: I know what I shall do, so that when I am removed from the management people will welcome me into their homes.’

esv.text: I have decided what to do, so that when I am removed from management, people may receive me into their houses.’

cnv.text: 我知道要怎麼作了，好使人在我離開管家的職務以後，接我到他們家裡去。’

ccb.text: 我知道该怎么办了！就算被辞退了，也会有人照应我。’

csbs.text: 我知道我该做什么了，好使我被免除管家的任务以后，人们会接我到他们家里去。’
